item.name: Cruise Chaser Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your Cruise Chaser will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Cruise Chaser
mount.action: Summon forth your Cruise Chaser to cruise along in style as you give chase to your foes.
mount.description: Created by the genius minds of the Illuminati, this warmachina is capable of assuming bipedal and airship forms to adapt to the changing conditions of battle. Smitten by its design, it is said that a certain warmachina fanatic has a mind to produce a miniature version.
